objective_pack.title: Protect Company
objective_pack.summary: Favor moves that lower legal exposure, preserve trust, limit commercial damage, and keep internal execution drag manageable.

historical_business_state.summary: Recorded business state centers on exposure risk and approval and escalation pressure.

indicators.summary: Exposure risk is high in the recorded path.

implications: Exposure risk is high in the recorded path.
Approval and escalation pressure is high in the recorded path.
Relationship stability stays mixed in the recorded path.

candidates.label: Restructure with explicit disclosure
candidates.prompt: Keep the structure alive, rewrite it with explicit disclosure language, and route the revision through finance, legal, and disclosure review.
candidates.explanation: Keep the transaction alive, but change the structure and disclosure.

forecast.summary: Predicted risk moves down by 0.180, with escalation delta -3 and external-send delta 0.

candidates.label: Narrow finance and legal review
